items.exact_fix_instruction: Core/auxiliary update does not fetch source_csv. Run reference enrichment with SOURCE_CSV_MODE=refresh to refresh a lightweight source_csv cache.
items.fix_hint: Core/auxiliary update does not fetch source_csv. Run reference enrichment with SOURCE_CSV_MODE=refresh to refresh a lightweight source_csv cache.
items.business_impact: Verified source CSV enrichment cache may not refresh; existing cache is used if available.
